is_transitive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](f, r)) = is_transitive[B](r)
is_reflexive[A](relation_pullback[A, B](f, r)) = is_reflexive[B](r)
is_antisymmetric[A](relation_pullback[A, B](f, r)) = is_antisymmetric[B](r)
not is_bijection_fn[A, B](f)
